patches.rationale: The repo-native minimal english fbank speaker verification path does not require s3prl, whisper, or w2vbert, but the fixed upstream commit eagerly imported those optional frontend families at module import time.
patches.scope: Convert optional frontend registry entries to lazy factories so imports happen only when those frontends are actually requested.
patches.minimality: Single-file patch; no behavior change for the validated fbank path beyond deferring unrelated imports.
